summary: ULO lease code marketplace web app with admin dashboard for managing lease listings and public frontend for displaying available codes
architectural_notes: Admin dashboard with Internet Identity auth for managing lease listings (nickname field admin-only)
Public query method (no auth) for fetching all lease entries from canister storage
Frontend displays partial lease codes (first 4 chars + '...' + first 4 after last hyphen)
Copy-to-clipboard functionality for full lease UUID codes
Visual status indicators for lease availability (green Available, red/grayed Unavailable)
Unity app download links (iOS/Android) integrated in frontend
Embedded YouTube shorts and unitynodes.io media kit images
known_issues: Public frontend not displaying any lease listings despite data existing in backend storage

existing_features.title: Update frontend/src/components/LeaseListings.tsx to properly fetch and display all existing lease entries from the backend, showing partial lease code (first 4 chars + '...' + first 4 chars after last hyphen, e.g., '2793...2003'), split ratio (e.g., '60/40'), and availability status with proper styling (green for Available, red/grayed for Unavailable)

Add a copy full code button for each lease listing that copies the complete UUID to clipboard when clicked, and disable/grey out this button when the lease is unavailable with a message 'This code is already in use. Please try another.'
Handle empty lease listings state by displaying a friendly message like 'No leases available yet — check back soon!' when the backend returns an empty array

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix the public query method in backend/main.mo to ensure it returns all lease listings without requiring authentication, and verify it is properly exposed as a public query function
